title: campanula pamphylica subsp. afyonica
intro: Campanula pamphylica subsp. afyonica, also known as the Afyon bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Campanula pamphylica subsp. afyonica include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
